title: Mobile layout component with tabbed preview and chat views
purpose: Provides a mobile-optimized layout with header, tabbed content area, and bottom navigation bar. Manages tab state and preserves component state across tab switches.
module_context: Exports MobileLayout component with TypeScript interfaces for props and handlers. Uses React hooks for state management and session store integration.

steps.content: Initialize active tab state to preview tab.
Retrieve current session from the session store.
Set up callback handler for tab changes from the bottom navigation.
Set up callback handler for auto-switching to chat tab when AI UI arrives.
Render the mobile layout container with header, session badge, tab content area, and bottom tab bar.
Display the preview tab content when active tab is preview.
Display the chat tab content when active tab is chat.
Update the active tab state to the selected tab.
Set the active tab state to chat tab.
